name: QVC Group, Inc.
business: QVC Group is a video and online commerce company that sells a wide variety of consumer products through televised shopping programs, websites, mobile applications, and social media platforms. Its principal businesses include QVC (U.S. and international) and Cornerstone Brands. The company operates in North America, Europe, and Asia.
sellsTo: Consumers in North America, Europe, and Asia
Primarily women over 50 in the U.S.

exposures.sentence: QVC is a live social shopping company that curates and sells a wide variety of consumer products through video-driven commerce on most every screen, from smartphones and tablets to laptops and TVs.
QVC offers a wide assortment of high-quality merchandise and classifies its products into six groups: home, apparel, beauty, accessories, electronics and jewelry.
Our integration and use, or the use by our competitors, of artificial intelligence and similar technology may pose risks and present challenges to our business, reputation, and results of operations.
Our businesses and information systems are subject to cybersecurity risks, including cybersecurity threats and cybersecurity incidents.

catalysts.sentence: On or about April 15, 2026 (the Petition Date), QVC Group and certain of our direct and indirect subsidiaries ... intend to commence voluntary cases under Chapter 11 of Title 11 of the United States Code in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas.

catalysts.event: Sale of remaining St. Petersburg property
catalysts.sentence: The sale of the remaining property is expected to be completed within the next twelve months.
